title: Spreadsheets, Python, Reproducibility, and Calculation Checks · Decision Notebook: Spreadsheet References
summary: Turn a hand calculation into a reusable, tested worksheet and small Python model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg spreadsheet references increment in a reproducible calculation tool with test cases. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use relative and absolute cell references intentionally in copied formulas.
Interpret intercepts and restrict conclusions to the meaningful domain of a model.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
